Simple Process

From Application to Funding

No stacks of paperwork. No weeks of waiting. Our streamlined process gets you to the closing table fast.

01

Apply Online

Complete our simple pre-qualification form in under 5 minutes. No credit pull required at this stage.

02

Deal Review

Our underwriting team evaluates your deal within 24–48 hours and issues a preliminary term sheet.

03

Term Sheet & Docs

Review and sign your term sheet. Upload property docs. Our team handles the rest.

04

Fund & Close

Title closes, funds wire, and you're at the table. Average time from application to funding: 5–7 days.

Start Your Application

Mortgage Protection

Protect Your Most
Valuable Asset

Mortgage Protection is a specialized form of life insurance designed to protect a homeowner's most important asset — their home. If the unexpected happens — death, disability, or serious illness — the policy provides funds to cover mortgage payments or pay off the loan balance, ensuring your family can remain in their home without financial hardship.

Why Mortgage Protection?

Death Benefit
If you pass away, the policy pays off your remaining mortgage balance so your family keeps the home.
Disability Coverage
If you become disabled and unable to work, monthly benefits cover your mortgage payments.
Critical Illness
Serious diagnoses like cancer, stroke, or heart attack trigger a lump-sum payout to protect your home.
Return of Premium
Some plans return all premiums paid if you outlive the policy term — protection at no final cost.

Unlike traditional life insurance that can be used for any purpose, mortgage protection is specifically structured to safeguard your home and provide peace of mind for you and your loved ones — no matter what life brings.

Get Protected Today

Fill out a quick form — a licensed specialist will contact you within 24 hours.

Quick 5-Min Form
Callback in 24 hrs
100% Confidential
Free Consultation

Fast Bridge Financing

Fix & Flip

Fast bridge financing for acquisition and renovation. We fund up to 90% of total project cost with draws released as work is completed.

Program Highlights

Loan Term6–18 months with interest-only payments
LTC/LTVUp to 90% of total project cost
RatesFrom 9.99% depending on experience
Draw ScheduleReimbursement as work completes
Property TypesSFR, Multi-Family, Condos, Townhomes

Requirements

  • Minimum 620 FICO score
  • Any level of investor experience welcome
  • Detailed scope of work required
  • Entity borrowing (LLC recommended)
  • Property insurance required

Features

Staged disbursements correlate with construction milestones. Submit draw requests with documentation for completed work.

Questions? Get in touch Apply Now
Debt Service Coverage Ratio Loan

DSCR Rental

Qualify based on property cash flow, not personal income. Perfect for investors building rental portfolios without traditional income verification.

Program Highlights

DSCR RatioAs low as 0.75 (No Ratio options available)
LTVUp to 80% for purchase, 75% cash-out
RatesFrom 6.00% depending on DSCR
Term30-year fixed or ARM options
Property TypesSFR, 2-4 Unit, Condos, STR eligible

Requirements

  • Minimum 620 FICO (680+ preferred)
  • Property must generate adequate rental income
  • Market rent analysis from appraisal
  • No personal income documentation required
  • First-time investors eligible

Features

Short-term rentals (Airbnb/VRBO) eligible. No limit on number of properties financed.

Questions? Get in touch Apply Now
New Construction Financing

Ground Up Construction

Complete financing solutions for builders and developers. From land acquisition through construction completion with flexible draw schedules.

Program Highlights

Loan Term12-24 months interest-only
LTCUp to 85% of construction cost
RatesFrom 9.99% based on experience
Draw ScheduleMonthly draws with inspection
TakeoutPermanent financing available

Requirements

  • Minimum 680 FICO score
  • Builder experience preferred
  • Detailed construction plans & budget
  • Licensed contractor required
  • Title and permit documentation

Features

Interest reserves available. Land acquisition can be included. No payments during construction phase available.

Questions? Get in touch Apply Now
Short-Term Bridge Financing

Bridge / Stabilized

Bridge financing for properties transitioning to permanent financing. Ideal for stabilized rentals or properties soon to be listed for sale.

Program Highlights

Loan Term12-18 months
LTVUp to 75% of stabilized value
RatesFrom 9.99%
Exit StrategyRefinance or sale required
Property TypesSFR, 2-4 Unit, Commercial

Requirements

  • Minimum 660 FICO score
  • Clear exit strategy documented
  • Property stabilized or near stabilization
  • DSCR 1.10+ for rental exit
  • No rural or unique properties

Features

Fast closings for time-sensitive acquisitions. No prepayment penalties. Interest-only payments preserve cash flow.

Questions? Get in touch Apply Now
Apartment & Multi-Unit Financing

Multi-Family

Long-term financing for 5+ unit residential properties. Competitive rates for stabilized apartment buildings and mixed-use properties.

Program Highlights

Loan Term30-year fixed or ARM
LTVUp to 75% for purchase
RatesFrom 7.00%
DSCRMinimum 1.25x required
RecourseNon-recourse options available

Requirements

  • Minimum 680 FICO score
  • Property must be stabilized
  • 90% occupancy for 90 days
  • Experienced property management
  • Environmental and engineering reports

Features

Agency and non-agency options. Interest-only periods available. Cash-out refinancing for portfolio growth.

Questions? Get in touch Apply Now
Commercial Real Estate Loans

Commercial Property

Financing for office, retail, industrial, and mixed-use properties. Flexible terms for stabilized commercial assets.

Program Highlights

Loan Term5, 7, or 10-year terms available
LTVUp to 75% of appraised value
RatesFrom 6.00%
AmortizationUp to 30 years
Property TypesOffice, Retail, Industrial, Mixed-Use

Requirements

  • Minimum 680 FICO score
  • Property must be income-producing
  • Tenant lease review required
  • Environmental Phase I required
  • Business entity borrowing required

Features

Non-recourse options with carve-outs. Interest-only periods. Assumable loans available. Prepayment flexibility.

Questions? Get in touch Apply Now
Conventional Mortgage

Primary Home Purchase

Traditional mortgages not insured by the government. Ideal for buyers with solid credit and stable finances purchasing or refinancing their primary residence.

Program Highlights

Credit ScoreMinimum 620+ typically required
Down PaymentAs low as 3% for eligible buyers
RatesFrom 5.99%
Property TypesPrimary, Second Home, Investment
PMICancelable at 20% equity

Requirements

  • Verifiable income and employment
  • W-2s, pay stubs, tax returns
  • Assets and reserves documented
  • Debt-to-income ratio guidelines
  • Appraisal and title insurance

Features

97% LTV Conventional, HomeReady® and Home Possible® programs available for lower down payments with qualifying criteria.

Questions? Get in touch Apply Now
